patch.value: Domain-max SDK enhancement: idempotent import, sync, preflight, renderer

Drastically enhance pm-github toward domain-appropriate max of the pm-cli SDK surface.

Value: turn the importer from a one-shot duplicating fetch into a real GitHub<->pm sync tool, and surface the remaining SDK capabilities that genuinely fit the GitHub-issues domain.

Outcome / acceptance criteria:
- Re-import is IDEMPOTENT: existing pm items matched by github_number provenance are UPDATEd (via pm update <id>), not duplicated. The schema fields github_url/github_number/github_state are actually populated (not just description text).
- --with-comments flag appends issue comments to the item body.
- New 'pm github sync' command pushes pm status changes back to GitHub (close/reopen linked issue) guarded by token + --repo + --dry-run preview.
- preflight capability validates token/gh auth + repo reachability before mutating github commands, with clear failure_hints.
- renderers capability registers a 'github' output format rendering pm items as GitHub-issue markdown.
- afterCommand hook made genuinely useful (still no surprise network calls by default).
- Rate-limit/backoff handling (Retry-After / X-RateLimit-Reset), timeouts retained.
- manifest capabilities updated to exactly match: commands, importers, schema, hooks, preflight, renderers.

Capabilities before: commands, importers, schema, hooks (4/9).
Capabilities after target: commands, importers, schema, hooks, preflight, renderers (6/9). search intentionally skipped (no genuinely useful remote search provider distinct from import filters).
